name: Fast N' Loud
overview: Motor mastermind Richard Rawlings and mechanical prodigy Aaron Kaufman search for forgotten and neglected vintage cars. They need big projects and big profits to keep the doors open at Gas Monkey Garage in Dallas, TX.

trailers.title: Fast N' Loud Preview | Premieres Wed June 6, 2012 at 10PM e/p on Discovery
Fast N' Loud | Premieres Wed, June 6, 2012 at 10PM e/p on Discovery*
